narrative:
Cuyahoga Heights-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 421 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points.
